description: This file defines functions and types related to generating and replacing placeholder elements in HTML, including rendering SVG or IMG placeholders with customizable options. It also includes functions for parsing HTML and sanitizing attributes, indicating its role in dynamic placeholder rendering within a web project.

methods.name: getPlaceholder
methods.description: Generates a placeholder object (SVG or IMG) with specified options, including classes, size, and accessibility attributes.

methods.name: replacePlaceholdersInHtml
methods.description: Replaces `<Placeholder />` components in HTML markup with generated SVG or IMG HTML strings, parsing the input HTML and handling placeholder elements.

methods.name: renderPlaceholderToString
methods.description: Converts a placeholder object into its corresponding HTML string representation.

methods.name: getOptionsWithDefaults
methods.description: Merges user-provided options with default values for placeholder configuration.

methods.name: getPlaceholderSrc
methods.description: Creates a data URI for an SVG placeholder image based on options such as background and text color.

methods.name: sanitizeHtmlAttributesFromMdx
methods.description: Sanitizes and converts attribute values from MDX syntax to proper JavaScript types.
